title: Added Docs Viewer Route Config And Hosted View Foundation
summary: Added focused Docs Viewer app-shell foundations for route config resolution, static access projection, index/document/info view state, and hosted-view registration while preserving current public read-only and local manage-mode behavior.
effect: Future info-panel, source-editor, semantic-reference, and portable-viewer work can now target explicit route, access, view-state, and hosted-view contracts instead of reading broad shell attributes or adding responsibility to docs-viewer.js. The current repo still uses route data attributes as migration input at boot, and backend reachability and writes remain gated by the existing local management capability flow.
verification: node syntax checks passed for docs-viewer.js, docs-viewer-app-shell.js, docs-viewer-app-context.js, docs-viewer-panel-layout.js, docs-viewer-access.js, docs-viewer-route-config.js, docs-viewer-view-state.js, and docs-viewer-hosted-views.js
Python py_compile passed for docs_viewer_service.py and docs_viewer_app_shell_modules.py
focused app-shell module smoke passed with route config, access, panel/view state, hosted-view, graceful absence, and compatibility ref coverage
public Docs Viewer read-only smoke passed against /tmp/dlf-jekyll-build
standalone Docs Viewer service manage smoke passed
